welcome.title: Welcome to DeutschFlow
welcome.subtitle: A quick guide to start your German journey
welcome.heroDesc: DeutschFlow combines AI speaking practice, gender-color vocabulary, spaced repetition and Goethe exam prep — all in one personalized roadmap.

steps.roadmapDesc: Move through 4 phases from foundation to Goethe exam readiness.
steps.vocabDesc: Memorize words by gender color (der/die/das) with examples & pronunciation.
steps.speakingDesc: German conversation and interviews with instant feedback.
steps.reviewDesc: The SRS system reminds you to review at the right time to remember longer.
steps.achievementsDesc: Earn XP, unlock badges and climb the leaderboard.
